Notice Ofmotion And Otion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Specially Prepared Interrogatories *Set One) Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetarysanctions Against Defts For Failure To Respond To Discovery;
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Francisco Gutierrez, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Nisa Anita Abdullah
Bruce Browning, defendant and opposing party, in Pro Per

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
Plaintiff Nisa Abdullah's Motion to compel response to form interrogatories (set one); specially prepared interrogatories (set one); requests for production of documents; and request for monetary sanctions granted in part:
1. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges;
2. Within 30 days of notice of entry of this order, defendants shall serve full, verified, and code compliant responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories (set one), and requests for production of documents (set one);
3. Plaintiff did not submit for the court's review the specially prepared interrogatories referenced in this motion, and therefore consideration of that discovery is ordered off calendar;
4. Sanctions shall issue against defendants, jointly and severally, in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
